name: staleness
description: The same fact retained (near-)identically at four backdated ages (7d/90d/400d/900d). Reports which age variant ranks first — and its P@5/R@5/MRR against the freshest variant as the labeled target — under decayHalfLifeDays 0/30/180 side by side, evidencing the library-default recency-decay tradeoff documented in CLAUDE.md.

probes.query: What does the reporting service use for local caching?
